message:
refactor(forget): Use regular import instead of dynamic import for deprecateBullet

The deprecateBullet function was being dynamically imported despite being
statically available from playbook.js. This change:
- Consolidates two separate imports from playbook.js into one
- Removes unnecessary dynamic import overhead
- Removes outdated comment about dynamic import
